items.title: Four dead and dozens injured in wave of Russian strikes on Kyiv
items.dek: More than 50 people have been injured, including three children, with damage reported across Kyiv and nearby areas.
items.body: More than 50 people have been injured, including three children, with damage reported across Kyiv and nearby areas.

items.title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
items.dek: The 39-year-old was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland.
items.body: The 39-year-old was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland.
